MINI MINUTES:

Atty. MARC S. SOBLE, ESQ. of Bonetati & Soble, Inc., Tel No. 714-466-6600 appearing telephonically for Cross-Defendant In & Out Drain Cleaning, Inc.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court modifies its tentative ruling (without objection from Cross-Defendant), and orders as follows: As to CROSS-DEFENDANT IN & OUT DRAIN CLEANING,INC.'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT filed by Cross-Complainant Dale Excavating, the demurrer to the sixth cause of action is sustained with twenty days leave to amend. The demurrer as to the seventh and eighth causes of action is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
